title: tagetes mandonii
intro: Tagetes mandonii, also known as Mexican Marigold or Mardon's Marigold, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which make it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Tagetes mandonii can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
